text:
The Hinobori Herb (ヒソボリ草, Hisobori Kusa)‎ is a type of medicinal herb. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Overview

The Hinobori Herb is one of the four herbs that Ponzu requests for, in her sidequest. 

Item Description

A medicinal herb characterized by red and round fruits.

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

Ponzu asks the Hunter group for four different kinds of herbs and when they manage to retrieve them, she thanks them and joins their group. 

References
